body:
During my time in the Navy, my tenure advising Senator Dan Coats and Governor Mitch Daniels, and in my current role as Lieutenant Governor, I’ve learn
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/3042e83d6dec492b850cff1a11daa0b1?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=d65a6d6c25634a6fbb97ba800c252112&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=Image_Header_Logo&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160827-why-we-set-goals-and-deadlines-13704-direct) |
| Friend, During my time in the Navy, my tenure advising Senator Dan Coats and Governor Mitch Daniels, and in my current role as Lieutenant Governor, I’ve learned how to set a goal and do everything I can to surpass it before the deadline.

**Now, I’m ready to answer the call to serve as your Governor.**

But first, we have hurdles to overcome.

**In 4 days, we’re up against another important deadline.

We need to raise $32,000 for August in order to move into September on solid financial footing and stay on track to win this election.

[Will you help us beat our goal by contributing $10 to Team Holcomb today?](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/72612d7720f74e7faad339b56b440595?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=d65a6d6c25634a6fbb97ba800c252112&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta_1&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160827-why-we-set-goals-and-deadlines-13704-direct)**

I believe we need a true consensus builder with a proven record getting things done. Hoosiers better than anyone understand that with commonsense, conservative principles, we can continue our momentum, grow our state and grow our economy.

**[Contribute any amount to help us beat our goal and win in November.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/d336896490804a41bcca7011365f93a6?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=d65a6d6c25634a6fbb97ba800c252112&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta_2&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160827-why-we-set-goals-and-deadlines-13704-direct)** |

name: Russ Feingold
subject: Important campaign update
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
My update from the trail. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4464/1c469400/711ac7a/3574e55/2380805843/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-august?utm_source=ema_2016-08-27_EOM1_nd-3t&refcode=ema_2016-08-27_EOM1_nd-3t&utm_campaign=EOM1&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- There's nothing quite like August in Wisconsin. It's an ideal time to be on the campaign trail. And we've been everywhere! Irish Fest and IndiaFest and visiting with the Urban League in Milwaukee, meeting fired-up volunteers with Tim Kaine, even helping one of my campaign interns move in at the University of Wisconsin-Madison. We ate our fair share at the Washburn County Fair Pancake Breakfast and had powerful conversations with the Red Cliff tribe on a walk through their national park in Bayfield. But I'm not the only one who's been busy. Since June 1, over 2,500 of our dedicated volunteers have completed a volunteer shift at one of our 41 coordinated campaign field offices, and our grassroots team has made hundreds of thousands of phone calls to reach supporters throughout the state. And, I'm proud that 40,000 Wisconsinites have donated to my campaign, with many more offering their endorsement. Because of you, we're building a campaign that every one of our supporters can be proud of. I can't say enough how much I appreciate your efforts. Thank you. But this thing is far from over. We're entering the home stretch of the campaign, and we have to make sure every voter in Wisconsin hears our message. To meet our budget goals for the month, we need to raise $150,000 more in grassroots contributions by August 31\. Can I count on you to help us reach our goal? **[Contribute $3 today to help us reach our $150,000 grassroots fundraising goal by midnight on August 31.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4464/1c469400/711ac7a/3574e55/2380805843/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-august?utm_source=ema_2016-08-27_EOM1_nd-3t&refcode=ema_2016-08-27_EOM1_nd-3t&utm_campaign=EOM1&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4464/1c469400/711ac7a/3574e55/2380805843/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-august?utm_source=ema_2016-08-27_EOM1_nd-3t&refcode=ema_2016-08-27_EOM1_nd-3t&utm_campaign=EOM1&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4464/1c469400/711ac7a/3574e55/2380805843/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-august?utm_source=ema_2016-08-27_EOM1_nd-3t&refcode=ema_2016-08-27_EOM1_nd-3t&utm_campaign=EOM1&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$3 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4464/1c469400/711ac7a/3574e52/2380805843/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-august?utm_source=ema_2016-08-27_EOM1_nd-3t&refcode=ema_2016-08-27_EOM1_nd-3t&utm_campaign=EOM1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=3")

clean_body: My update from the trail. | "" Friend -- There's nothing quite like August in Wisconsin. It's an ideal time to be on the campaign trail. And we've been everywhere! Irish Fest and IndiaFest and visiting with the Urban League in Milwaukee, meeting fired-up volunteers with Tim Kaine, even helping one of my campaign interns move in at the University of Wisconsin-Madison. We ate our fair share at the Washburn County Fair Pancake Breakfast and had powerful conversations with the Red Cliff tribe on a walk through their national park in Bayfield. But I'm not the only one who's been busy. Since June 1, over 2,500 of our dedicated volunteers have completed a volunteer shift at one of our 41 coordinated campaign field offices, and our grassroots team has made hundreds of thousands of phone calls to reach supporters throughout the state. And, I'm proud that 40,000 Wisconsinites have donated to my campaign, with many more offering their endorsement. Because of you, we're building a campaign that every one of our supporters can be proud of. I can't say enough how much I appreciate your efforts. Thank you. But this thing is far from over. We're entering the home stretch of the campaign, and we have to make sure every voter in Wisconsin hears our message. name: Jon Tester
subject: I've seen firsthand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

This is important. Tonight is Steve's big August financial deadline.

With Greg Gianforte blanketing the airwaves and filling up our mail boxes with nasty, misleading attacks, it's all the more important that we join together to have Steve's back. **[Will you donate $22?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=1Vn3zXK76lg%2FhIHOKrcoTGHgjSFy%2BTUp)**

I've seen firsthand how hard Steve is working for Montana. He's reached across the aisle to balance the budget every year while holding the line on taxes. He's shored up the rainy day fund -- in fact, Montana is ranked as the most fiscally prudent state in the country. Steve's made record investments in our public schools and frozen tuition at our universities. Unemployment is down and wages are up.

I'm looking forward to seeing everything Steve will get done for our state if we give him another four years. But right now, an out-of-state special interest group is spending big to try to tear down Montana just to get Greg Gianforte elected governor. That's not the Montana way.

**[Please take the time to donate $22 to Steve before his 11:59PM deadline tonight.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=iT0CiINhF2LphIeAbA5RvWHgjSFy%2BTUp)** It will make a big difference for our state's future.

Thanks,
Jon Tester

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: I don’t like having to do this, Derek
body:
We need to keep this campaign running | Derek --

I sent a couple of more-urgent-than-usual fundraising emails this month. I don’t like having to do that unless it's absolutely necessary.

But right now, as we near the very last FEC deadline before actual voting begins, we’re still not in the clear, Derek. We missed a few benchmarks this month, so we’ve set an ambitious goal: **[We want to raise $10 million by midnight on August 31st. Will you chip in right now to get a free sticker, help us hit that mark, and close out August with a number that puts us back on track?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjYzNTQ4MDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0ODA5NTUzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

We didn't choose an amount at random -- $10 million is what we need to keep running a campaign that will beat Donald Trump this fall. Part of the reason we’re ahead in the polls right now is because we’ve got a fully-funded field operation and we’re advertising strategically and efficiently.

We’ve made deliberate choices and spent money wisely. We can’t stop now that we’re a little bit ahead.

And $10 million is also the amount we think we need to keep outraising Trump. If we keep our lead this month -- after he got dangerously close to outpacing us back in July -- we’re going to cement our status as the team to beat.

We need that status to be indisputable, Derek.

**Let’s blow Trump’s August numbers away. Let’s raise $10 million in one week. I know we can do it with each one of us stepping up, digging in our heels a little more, and committing to the big win:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYzNTQ4MDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0ODA5NTUzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 before our monthly fundraising deadline to stand with this team:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYzNTQ4MDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0ODA5NTUzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Corry Bliss
subject: 50 stops, 30 counties, 3,500 miles
body:
| Peter --

Wow! What an incredible two weeks on our "Moving Ohio Forward" Summer RV Tour. Rob, Jane, and Sally visited with thousands of supporters on over 50 stops across 30 counties spanning 3,500 miles, including events in Cincinnati, Dayton, Toledo, Maumee, Miamisburg, Delaware, Columbus, Bergholz, Hanoverton, Tiffin, Mayfield Heights, Akron, Lima, Zanesville, Cambridge, West Chester, and many more. While Ted Strickland made a handful of public appearances over the past two weeks, one newspaper wrote "rare is the day when Portman is not racing around the state." We will not be outworked! Click below to watch a recap of our Summer RV tour. We actually made more stops over the past two weeks than Ted Strickland has made all year! [](https://www.robportman.com/watch_rv_tour_highlights?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rvtour_end&n=1) We kicked off our tour on Super Saturday when we contacted over 100,000 voters in a single day, opened new offices in Delaware and Mayfield Heights, toured a coal mine with Senator Shelley Moore Capito in Bergholz, and met with members of the Fraternal Order of Police, the IUOE Local 18, and the Ohio Conference of Teamsters.

We're focused on spreading our positive message of pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs. We know Ohio can't afford a return to the days of Ted Strickland's Ohio when the state lost more than 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation. Thanks for your support -- [please click here to sign up to volunteer or display a yard sign](https://www.robportman.com/yard_signs?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rvtour_end&n=2)!

Sincerely,

Corry Bliss [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rvtour_end&n=3)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rvtour_end&n=4)[](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rvtour_end&n=5 "Donate Here!")

name: Tim Kaine
subject: We need you in Virginia
body:
| Hi, Derek!

I've run for election eight times during my career, and it’s no secret what it takes to win: volunteers. We need people to get out there and talk to voters about standing up for our values and making our voices heard. I appreciate all the supporters like you who take time out of your days to make a difference for our future.

We have volunteer opportunities this weekend in Virginia -- have you signed up to volunteer yet? **[We need you out there, so add your name now!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=56&ms=MjYzNTQ5ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0ODE0NDAyS0&mt=2&rj=ODY0ODE0NDAyS0&rt=0)**

We know what’s at stake in this election. We don’t want a “you’re fired” president, we want a “you’re hired” president. We want a bridge-builder, not a trash-talker. I promise you, Hillary is out there fighting every minute so that she can win every single vote, but she can’t do this on her own -- that’s why she and I are so grateful for folks like you.

**So if you’re as excited as I am to get out there and win in November, I hope you’ll sign up right now to talk to voters for an hour or two -- it’s one of the most important things you can do for the campaign, and Hillary and I really appreciate the help:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=28&ms=MjYzNTQ5ODUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0ODE0NDAyS0&mt=2&rj=ODY0ODE0NDAyS0&rt=0)
Thank you,

Tim

| **** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).

name: Barbra Streisand
subject: I would love to meet you, Derek
body:
Meet us there? | Derek --

I’m thrilled that Hillary is running for president, and I’m proud to support her. She’s very, very smart and has a lot of experience -- and I think our country is more than ready for a woman to lead us!

**[I'm spending an evening campaigning with Hillary in New York City next week, and I would love to meet you there. Will you add your name for a chance to win a free trip to join us?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjYzNTUyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0ODI0NTE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

When I was a kid and told my mom I wanted to be an actress, she said, “Well, you're not pretty enough; you better cut your nails off and become a typist so you'll have a job.”

Years later, I was trying to make my first movie, _Yentl_ , and man after man in Hollywood told me I was just an actress -- I could never direct and produce a film. So many of us -- especially women -- know how it feels to be told, “No, you can’t.” It’s easy to believe that about ourselves. It’s harder to believe the truth: that we have power, and we can use it. Hillary Clinton is the proof.

I’m ready to do whatever it takes to help Hillary get to the White House. Derek, I'm so glad you're on her team, too, and I would love to thank you (and your guest!) in person for all the work you're doing to help Hillary win.

**You have to add your name before midnight for a chance to win, so don't wait. I want you to be right up front when I sing:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYzNTUyMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0ODI0NTE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Barbra

subject: FWD: I would love to meet you, Derek
body:
Did you see this? | Derek --

We wanted to make sure you saw this: Barbra Streisand is joining Hillary for a special performance in New York City, and you could be there for it.

**Add your name now, and you’ll have a shot at sitting front and center -- we’ll even foot the bill for you and a friend! The deadline is midnight -- don’t miss out:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYzNTU1OTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0ODQzMzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Your friends at Hillary for America

\----Forwarded message----
From: Barbra Streisand
Subject: I would love to meet you, Derek
Derek --

I’m thrilled that Hillary is running for president, and I’m proud to support her. She’s very, very smart and has a lot of experience -- and I think our country is more than ready for a woman to lead us!

**[I'm spending an evening campaigning with Hillary in New York City next week, and I would love to meet you there. Will you add your name for a chance to win a free trip to join us?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjYzNTU1OTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0ODQzMzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

When I was a kid and told my mom I wanted to be an actress, she said, “Well, you're not pretty enough; you better cut your nails off and become a typist so you'll have a job.”

Years later, I was trying to make my first movie, _Yentl_ , and man after man in Hollywood told me I was just an actress -- I could never direct and produce a film. So many of us -- especially women -- know how it feels to be told, “No, you can’t.” It’s easy to believe that about ourselves. It’s harder to believe the truth: that we have power, and we can use it. Hillary Clinton is the proof.

I’m ready to do whatever it takes to help Hillary get to the White House. Derek, I'm so glad you're on her team, too, and I would love to thank you (and your guest!) in person for all the work you're doing to help Hillary win.

**You have to add your name before midnight for a chance to win, so don't wait. I want you to be right up front when I sing:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYzNTU1OTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0ODQzMzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Barbra
